instruction: Using Terminal, append the suffix {SUFFIX} to the end of each line of the file ~/{FILE} (whose lines are 1, 2, 3) and save the result to ~/output.txt.
source:
adapted:osworld:5ced85fc-fa1a-4217-95fd-0fb530545ce2 mode=port; OSWorld os 'append
to each line and save to output.txt' is a POSIX text-processing task; maps verbatim to Terminal/exec (sed) with a Tier-A file getter
